name: Asparagus & Chicken Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in a large pot of salted boiling water until al dente, about 8 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, snap off and discard the woody ends of asparagus. Slice spears into 2-inch pieces.
3. Add asparagus to the pasta during the last 3 minutes of cooking.
4. Cut chicken into strips.
5. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add chicken.
6. Stir often until cooked through, about 3 minutes.
7. Stir in wine and seasonings.
8. Drain pasta and asparagus. Toss with chicken.
